S.FORM: Anthony Avent 10 bulad 18 demiad, 1969 a mihca, Anthony Avent, miunduay.
S.PHON: antħonj a*ənt ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, antħonj a*ənt, miunduaj.
